sql_array: CREATE TABLE ip_addresses (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ip inet NOT NULL);
SELECT sys.right_shift(inet '192.168.1/24', ip) AS can_right_shift FROM ip_addresses;
UPDATE ip_addresses SET ip = inet '192.168.2.5' WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM ip_addresses WHERE sys.right_shift(inet '192.168.1/24', ip);
